title: About the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade
21 September 2023, 10:45am
Information about taking part in the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade, such as why we carry out the survey, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
The purpose of the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade is to provide:
- timely and short-term indicator statistics on the retail industries of the economy
- quarterly data on the value of sales, stockholding, purchases, salaries and wages, and profits, which feed into measures of New Zealand's GDP
- information on the level of consumer spending, which is an important indication of confidence in the New Zealand economy.
Of the approximately 28,000 retail businesses in New Zealand, 360 are selected to participate in the survey. Businesses are selected based on their complexity and the size of their contribution to the retail industry. The survey includes businesses engaged in selling goods and services to the general public. Retail businesses we survey may:
- have a physical shop location designed to attract walk-in customers
- sell goods without a physical shop-front location (eg businesses selling online)
- sell services (eg hospitality services).
You may be selected to participate in the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade if we classify your business as being in any of the following industries:
- supermarket and grocery stores
- specialised food retailing
- non-store and commission-based retailing
- furniture, floor coverings, houseware, and textiles retailing
- hardware, building, and garden supplies retailing
- recreational goods retailing
- clothing, footwear, and accessories retailing
- electrical and electronic goods retailing
- pharmaceutical and other store-based retailing
- food and beverage services
- motor vehicle and parts retailing
Your business is classified based on its predominant activity in terms of sales. Sometimes the way we classify a business is different from how a business describes its activities.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Quarterly Survey of Retail Trade.
The survey is carried out every quarter.

## How to complete the survey
You fill in either a paper or electronic (editable PDF) questionnaire.
- Information to complete your Quarterly Business Survey questionnaire online Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 120 KB

### Information to complete your Quarterly Business Survey questionnaire online
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 120 KB
- Gross domestic product

- Contact us for survey help 26 May 2020
